title: rosa adscita var. typica
intro: Rosa adscita var. typica, also known as the "Dwarf Sweetbriar", is a variety of fragrant, white-flowering rose shrub native to Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Rosa adscita var. typica include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and provide relief from digestive issues. Rosa adscita var. typica is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or as a tincture, and is often used to treat a range of conditions, including skin irritations and respiratory issues.
